## Summary

This wave implements zero-tolerance mechanical blocking of admin-ceremony defects in the
`maturion-foreman-governance` canonical governance repository.

### Deliverables

**Workstream B — CI/Workflow Gate Convergence**
- Created `admin-ceremony-defect-gate.yml` with 5 new blocking checks (template leakage,
  placeholder tokens, alignment overclaim, carried-forward source, cross-artifact contradiction)
- Updated `merge-gate-interface.yml` to add ALIGNED overclaim sub-check to governance/alignment job

**Workstream C — Placeholder-Check Canon Binding**
- Created `validate-placeholder-check.sh` implementing EXC-001 through EXC-005
- Integrated into `agent-contract-audit.yml` as PLACEHOLDER-CHECK-001 gate

**Workstream D — Alignment Inventory Truth Hardening**
- Both `admin-ceremony-defect-gate.yml` and `merge-gate-interface.yml` now block ALIGNED entries
  with stale/TBD/placeholder hash or version metadata

**Workstream E — Proof-of-Operation**
- Clean-path proof: this PR is the proof-of-operation
- Adversarial rejection fixtures: 5 seeded-bad scenarios documented with expected rejection gates

### No Existing Gate Weakened

No existing admin-compliance or assurance gate was weakened or removed.
All changes are additive enforcement.
